subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — I'd be glad to continue the conversation we started at the conference.

I'm open for a 30-minute call next week. How would Tuesday at 2pm or Thursday at 10am work for you? If neither suits, suggest a few alternatives and I'll do my best to accommodate.

On the senior-level technical discussion: rather than sharing direct contact details, I can coordinate internally and set up the right meeting with our technical leadership once we're aligned on the direction. This ensures the conversation happens with proper context and preparation on both sides.

Let me know your availability!

Best regards
